LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-17-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JOHN CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JOHN CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion for change of venue" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
